title: Prototype Pollution in lodash
description: Lodash versions prior to 4.17.21 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution via the merge function.

title: Security bypass in Flask
description: Flask versions before 2.3.3 contain a security bypass vulnerability.

title: HTTP/2 rapid reset in x/net
description: golang.org/x/net before 0.17.0 is vulnerable to HTTP/2 rapid reset attack.

title: Open redirect in Express
description: Express before 4.18.2 is vulnerable to open redirect via URL parsing.

title: Buffer overflow in OpenSSL
description: OpenSSL before 3.0.12 contains a buffer overflow vulnerability.

title: Cookie injection in curl
description: curl before 8.4.0 is vulnerable to cookie injection.

title: Unintended credential exposure in Requests
description: Requests before 2.31.0 may leak credentials when redirecting to a different host.

title: Denial of service in Gin
description: Gin before 1.9.1 is vulnerable to a denial of service via crafted input.
